The question is asking to determine which nation had the fastest record based on the provided data. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "time" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(time) operation. This will allow us to see the fastest time at the top of the list, helping us identify the corresponding nation.
The fastest record corresponds to the shortest time in the table. Looking at the times, the shortest time is 5:19.35, which belongs to Canada. Therefore, the nation with the fastest record is Canada.
